message:
fix(config): repo_spec_to_path respects resolved PROJECTS_DIR config

The repo_spec_to_path function now correctly uses the priority order:
1. $PROJECTS_DIR (resolved from config file via resolve_config)
2. $RU_PROJECTS_DIR (environment variable override)
3. /data/projects (default)

Previously, the function only checked $RU_PROJECTS_DIR, bypassing any
projects_dir setting from the config file (~/.config/ru/config).

This ensures users who set projects_dir in their config file see that
setting respected when resolving repository paths.

🤖 Generated with [Claude Code](https://claude.com/claude-code)

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>

files.patch:
@@ -354,8 +354,8 @@ repo_spec_to_path() {
     local repo="${repo_spec%%@*}"
     # Extract repo name (last component)
     local repo_name="${repo##*/}"
-    # Use configured projects directory
-    local projects_dir="${RU_PROJECTS_DIR:-/data/projects}"
+    # Use resolved config first, then env override, then default
+    local projects_dir="${PROJECTS_DIR:-${RU_PROJECTS_DIR:-/data/projects}}"
 
     echo "${projects_dir}/${repo_name}"
 }
